title: Apple Crumble
description: A classic dessert with a mixture of tender apples and a crunchy oat topping.
instructions: Peel and slice the apples, then mix with sugar and sweetener.
Transfer the apple mixture to a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, combine crispy oats, crumble, and sugar.
Add the crumble mixture on top of the apple mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the apples are tender and the topping is golden brown.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream, if desired.
